message:
feat(providers): add display_name field to provider metadata and enhance list_providers output

Provider listing previously showed only the canonical_id, which can be
cryptic for users (e.g., "xai" instead of "xAI (Grok)", "togetherai"
instead of "Together AI"). This change adds human-friendly display names
and surfaces them in the CLI.

provider_metadata.rs:
- Add two new tests: display_name_populated_for_major_providers() verifies
  14 major providers have correct display names (Anthropic, OpenAI,
  Google Gemini, xAI (Grok), Together AI, Hugging Face, NVIDIA NIM,
  Amazon Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, GitHub Copilot, Google Vertex AI,
  DeepSeek, Mistral AI, LM Studio)
- all_providers_have_display_name() ensures no provider in the static
  PROVIDER_METADATA array has display_name: None

main.rs (list_providers):
- Add "name" column to the provider table output between "provider" and
  "aliases", sourced from meta.display_name (falls back to canonical_id)
- Update column width calculation and format strings for the new column
- Switch final row println! to use inline format args for cleaner output

providers/mod.rs:
- Promote max_edit_distance() to const fn (pure match expression)
- Reformat suggest_similar_providers() match arm for clippy line length

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
